content:
**【伺服器煥新說明/Server Update Notes】**
————————————

你好，守密人🌹
為提升各位守密人的頻道使用體驗，我們將在3月28日~3月31日期間，陸續調整「忘卻前夜Morimens」伺服器的各個功能和頻道。

**⭐️我們將透過以下方式實現：**在現在伺服器裡新建論壇、新建聊天頻道、改名並移動部分舊論壇&舊聊天頻道。大家過去發的貼文、聊天記錄都不會遺失。
⭐️各位守密人在使用升級後的伺服器時，遇到任何使用上的**問題都可以@Goya，我會積極為大家解答。**
————————————

**以下是幾個重要頻道的簡單說明，詳細介紹大家可以點選下方圖片查看：**

**🔵 官方資訊**
（1）這個頻道包含了4個論壇：遊戲公告 、活動資訊、校貓日誌、官方素材
（2）用來發布遊戲資訊、社群活動等官方內容，所有資訊都將以中英雙語發布。
**🔵 回饋與建議**
（1）這個頻道包含了2個論壇：有問必答、翻譯回饋收集。
（2）用來收集和回答大家遇到的bug，想給遊戲的建議等。
**🔵 遊戲幫助**
（1）這個頻道包含3個中文論壇：遊戲攻略、新人幫助、組隊建議。
（2）觀察到較多玩家在遊戲初期有很多困惑，故新加了「新人幫助」和「組隊建議」論壇方便大家發文討論。
**🔵 影畫長廊**
（1）這個頻道包含3個中文論壇：同人創作、考據研究、影片分享。
（2）大家可以把自己的二創作品、遊戲劇情等討論分享在這裡。
**🔵 全球聊天**
（1）大家可以在這個聊天頻道和不同語言的玩家聊天。
（2）**我們在伺服器安裝了【翻譯器】，它能翻譯各國語言，歡迎大家使用！**
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1349336678959022121


@everyone感謝大家對《忘卻前夜》的喜愛，未來我們將努力為各位守密人提供更好的遊戲體驗與社區服務💖

——————————————————————


Hello,  Keeper🌹
In order to improve the channel experience of all  Keepers, we will gradually adjust the various functions and channels of the 【忘卻前夜Morimens】server from March 28th to March 31st.

**⭐️We will achieve this in the following ways：**
 create a new forum and chat channel in the current server, rename and move some old forums and old chat channels. Your past posts and chat records will not be lost.
⭐️When using the upgraded server,** if you encounter any problems, you can @Goya and I will actively answer them for you.**

🌹 
**Below is a brief description of several important channels. For detailed introduction, you can click on the picture below to view it:**

**🔵 Official Information**
(1) This channel contains 4 forums：Game Announcement, Event Information, Schoolcat’s-notes, Official Materials
(2) Used to publish game information, community activities and other official content. All information will be published in both Chinese and English.
**🔵 Feedback and Suggestions**
(1) This channel contains 2 forums：Official Q&A, mistanslation
(2) Used to collect and answer bugs encountered by everyone, suggestions for the game, etc.
**🔵 Game Help**
(1) This channel contains 3 Chinese forums：Game Guide, Newcomer Help, and Team Building.
(2) We have observed that many players have a lot of confusion in the early stages of the game, so we have added the "Newcomer Help" and "Team Building" forums to facilitate everyone to post and discuss.
**🔵 Morimens Gallery**
(1) This channel contains 3 Chinese forums：Fan Art, Story Discussion.
(2) Everyone can share their own secondary creations, game plots, etc. here.
**🔵 Global Chat**
(1) Everyone can chat with players of different languages in this chat channel.
(2) **We have installed a 【Translator】on the server, which can translate languages from various countries. Everyone is welcome to use it!**
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1349336678959022121

@everyone Thank you for your love for 《Morimens》. In the future, we will work hard to provide better game experience and community services for all keepers💖
